channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Over grown tree, 13th June
item.description:
Large branches overhanging into property. Recent bad weather has caused branches to fall into property and onto cars. Please could overhanging branches be pruned before larger branches fall and cause excessive damage.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bickley Park Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 23, 13th June
item.description:
Public tree is to low to walk past

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shrewsbury Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping of rubbish, 13th June
item.description:
Continual fly tipping causing health issues. Rats seen.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marlborough Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 13th June
item.description:
Flytipping near 17 A hallswelle parade , on Ashbourne Avenue

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CW110 street light on all time, 13th June
item.description:
Street light in copse is on all day.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rocky manhole cover in middle of Hilldrop Road, 13th June
item.description:
Very rocky noisy manhole cover

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 57, Hilldrop Road, Tufnell Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large oil spill causing slippery road conditions, 13th June
item.description:
Looks like cooking oil all over the road. Might have caused one bicycle accident already.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Old Dover Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cycle path floods after heavy rain, 13th June
item.description:
Cycle path has started flooding again after heavy rain which is dangerous when you come across it and there is oncoming traffic in the main road lane. This was a historic issue which was resolved for quite a while but has come back. Maybe the gulleys are blocked or drain has collapsed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bounds Green Road, Hornsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Divan base on walkway, 13th June
item.description:
Dumped bed base. Originally dumped under bridge, then thrown in river by idiots. Someone hauled it out but only a matter of time before it’s chucked back in the water.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haldane Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unknown bottles of liquid left on kerbside, 13th June
item.description:
A van with several males on board was seen have its door opened and several bottles of unknown liquid was left on the kerbside. A female challenged them and filmed them but this did not make the males to alight from the van and retrieve the bottles. These bottles were now left on the road by the kerbside and were drove over by several vehicles. Please can these bottles be arranged to be cleaned up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rectory Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous broken mirror dumped on corner of Lidfield Road and Green Lanes, 13th June
item.description:
A large, broken shard of mirror glass has been dumped on the corner of Green Lanes and Lidfield Road. It’s not been wrapped or boxed and could cause very serious injury if someone were to trip or fall on it. It could also easily be picked up and used as an offensive weapon.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 37-43, Green Lanes, Stoke Newington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping again in Coxmount Road, 13th June
item.description:
There is fly tipping again near the top of Coxmount Road. The residents are sick of this as it's been going on for years! When are the council going to install a camera to catch these people?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wolfe Crescent, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping opposite 93 elderfield rd, e5, 13th June
item.description:
Dumped bath and black bags opposite 93 Elderfield Rd, E5
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Sewdley Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside 36 Glenilla Rd, 13th June
item.description:
Deep pothole that is getting larger every week.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Glenilla Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree branches and thorny brambles, 13th June
item.description:
Branches and brambles over hanging a wall at face level and when dark a danger on the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Church Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish bag dumped, 13th June
item.description:
Amazon bag been dumped On pavement. Do not know contents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Harold Avenue, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trip hazard, 13th June
item.description:
Manhole cover is raised and is a trip hazard

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lewisham Road, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bikes are always abandoned here, 13th June
item.description:
Bikes are always abandoned here.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ambergate Street, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting needs removing from lamppost please, 13th June
item.description:
.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mottingham Lane, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bench not usable as slat missing, 13th June
item.description:
The bench is missing its middle slat, making it very uncomfortable to sit on. Please replace middle slat so this bench is used again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tetty Way, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
